ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree measurement entry */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path to the shapefile containing tree data */,
  "plot_center_x" REAL /* X coordinate of the plot center */,
  "plot_center_y" REAL /* Y coordinate of the plot center */,
  "tree_density" INTEGER /* Density of trees in the plot */,
  "average_height" REAL /* Average height of trees in the plot */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of trees in the plot */,
  "plot_size" REAL /* Size of the plot in square meters */,
  "total_height" REAL /* Total height of all trees in the plot */,
  "number_of_trees" INTEGER /* Total number of trees in the plot */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'low') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where data is collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., 'forest', 'urban', 'wetland') */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Total area of the site in square meters */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year record */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year when the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the measurement period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the measurement period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the year (e.g., weather conditions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree measurement entry */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., 'shapefile', 'CSV') */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'researcher', 'data manager') */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., 'University of XYZ') */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree measurement entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'download') */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_coordinates" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot coordinate entry */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree measurement entry */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the plot */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the plot */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the plot in meters */,
  "coordinate_system" TEXT /* Coordinate system used (e.g., 'WGS84', 'UTM') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_coordinates_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_types" (
  "tree_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree type */,
  "tree_type_name" TEXT /* Common name of the tree type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tree type */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the tree type */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the tree type */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the tree type */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the tree type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the tree species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the tree species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the tree species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the tree species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tree species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)
